steps.title: Determine what the blank must express
steps.content: The sentence says folk and traditional art "can take a wide variety of forms, including art as ______ one another as storytelling and quilting." The phrase "wide variety of forms" signals diversity, and the examples — storytelling and quilting — are given to illustrate how unlike each other these forms can be. The blank must express the relationship between those contrasting examples.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test each choice in the sentence "including art as ______ one another as storytelling and quilting":
  • Choice A — confused with: "Art as confused with one another as storytelling and quilting" — confused with implies mistaking one thing for another; the sentence is about diversity of form, not about being mistakable. ✗
  • Choice B — humble about: "Art as humble about one another as storytelling and quilting" — humble about is a personality trait, not a relationship between art forms; grammatically and logically nonsensical here. ✗
  • Choice C — useful to: "Art as useful to one another as storytelling and quilting" — useful to describes utility between things, not variety of form; the passage makes no claim about quilting and storytelling being mutually useful. ✗
  • Choice D — different from: "Art as different from one another as storytelling and quilting" — this expresses the contrasting diversity the passage signals with "wide variety of forms," and storytelling vs. quilting are apt examples of very different forms. ✓
That matches Choice D — different from.
